source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: High-clarity product UI typography with tabular incident numerals and Japanese guidance tuned for scanning, escalation, and response workflows.
layout: Compact 8px operational grids, angular crystal-edge panels, high-contrast alert hierarchy, clear dashboard lanes, and subtle fumarole vapor texture.

prompts.label: Transparent sulfur crystal motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Sulfur transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a sulfur crystal mineral motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural sulfur crystal cluster from a volcanic fumarole, with bright canary-yellow orthorhombic crystals, chalky ash-grey mineral crust, small porous volcanic matrix fragments, subtle vapor-etched surfaces, sharp faceted crystal points, and safety-alert visual character. Geological accuracy, alert incident system identity, no jewelry or fantasy object.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full crystal mass without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves sulfur's waxy yellow translucency and granular ash crust; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no fire flames, no lava flow, no people, no respirator, no warning symbol printed on the crystal, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose gemstones, no other minerals dominating.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sulfur light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sulfur", derived from a sulfur crystal motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible alert incident system UI theme.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sulfur, Sulfur Crystal, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from bright canary-yellow sulfur crystals, ash grey volcanic crust, pale fumarole vapor, dark volcanic glass, oxidized warning amber, and chalky mineral dust. The board must read as sulfur crystal at a volcanic fumarole, not generic construction signage or cyberpunk.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Incident Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, incident dashboard metric cards, severity timeline, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple alert icons.
Style: alert incident system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, 8px radius with angular crystal cuts, warm off-white vapor background, bright sulfur yellow primary actions, ash-grey panels, charcoal volcanic text, caution amber accents, precise grid, subtle mineral grain and vapor texture, accessible high contrast.
Palette names to show: Vapor White, Volcanic Ink, Sulfur Core, Crystal Edge, Ash Grey, Fumarole Mist, Warning Amber, Char Dust, Basalt Black.
Constraints: no flames, no lava dominance, no biohazard symbol, no generic yellow-black stripe overload, no neon green, no purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sulfur", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sulfur dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Sulfur". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the sulfur crystal motif.
Canvas: 3840x2160 wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sulfur, Sulfur Crystal, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve bright sulfur yellow active states, ash-grey crust surfaces, pale fumarole vapor text, charcoal volcanic panels, warning amber severity, and precise 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as sulfur crystals at a volcanic fumarole, not generic construction signage or cyberpunk.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Incident Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, incident dashboard metric cards, severity timeline, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple alert icons.
Visual details: basalt black and volcanic ink backgrounds, ash-grey cards, vapor-white foreground text, sulfur-core buttons, crystal-edge highlights, amber warnings, charcoal borders, subtle fumarole vapor and mineral grain texture, urgent operational tone, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Vapor White, Volcanic Ink, Sulfur Core, Crystal Edge, Ash Grey, Fumarole Mist, Warning Amber, Char Dust, Basalt Black.
Constraints: no flames, no lava dominance, no biohazard symbol, no generic yellow-black stripe overload, no neon green, no pure-black-only flat background, no purple/blue gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sulfur".
